articles.excerpt: India has raised fuel prices by 3 rupees per liter to offset losses from higher global oil prices
articles.content:
NEW DELHI -- India raised fuel prices by 3 rupees ($0.03) per liter Friday as the government moved to offset losses due to higher global oil prices.
In New Delhi, gasoline prices rose to 97.77 rupee…
articles.author: SHEIKH SAALIQ Associated Press
